• Brand check-in at the start and end of the year, scoring consistency across our key surfaces.
  • Share of campaigns and products moved onto the updated visual system.

We raise the bar on craft & impact. What we ship should be functional, considered, and measured against a clear quality standard before it goes live. We'll track:

  • Share of shipped work that passes the design quality review.
  • Task-completion rates on the key journeys — can people actually do the thing we built?
➤➤➤

We'll report on progress in the regular updates and adjust as the year evolves. Thanks to @designlead, the design leads, and everyone who contributed reflections and feedback to shape these goals. Great year so far — looking forward to what's next. 🖤
